improvements.proposal: Instruct the code-implementor-agent to cross-check every README/local.settings key against runtime code references (os.getenv usage) and update templates/examples in the same change when mismatches are found.
improvements.based_on_finding: Local settings key mismatch with runtime expectation

improvements.proposal: Require authentication documentation tasks to include concrete role/permission setup steps and at least one verification command (for example az role assignment checks), not only high-level credential descriptions.
improvements.based_on_finding: TRAPI auth section lacked explicit credential/role setup guidance

improvements.proposal: When acceptance criteria include external approval, the agent should explicitly mark it as external dependency, report current status, and request reviewer action early.
